name: PER_PORTRAIT_MESSAGES_VL
query: SELECT B.PORTRAIT_MESSAGE_ID, T.PORTRAIT_MESSAGE_CONTENT, B.SHOW_CAL_EVT_CATEGORY, B.PRIORITY, B.MESSAGE_TYPE, B.TIME_FROM, B.TIME_TO, B.TARGET_PERSON_ID, B.TARGET_DEPARTMENT_ID, B.TARGET_LOCATION_ID, B.TARGET_ORGANIZATION_TREE_CODE, B.TARGET_ORGANIZATION_TOP_NODE, B.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, B.CREATED_BY, B.CREATION_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATED_BY, B.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, B.ENTERPRISE_ID FROM PER_PORTRAIT_MESSAGES_B B, PER_PORTRAIT_MESSAGES_TL T WHERE B.PORTRAIT_MESSAGE_ID = T.PORTRAIT_MESSAGE_ID AND T.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG')
